seoTitle: Monday.com Tutorial: Using Sidekick AI for Tasks
metaDescription: A beginner's guide to Monday.com covering the basics plus how to use Sidekick AI to speed up task and project management.
intro: Monday.com combines flexible boards for tracking work with Sidekick, its built-in AI assistant, to help you set things up faster. This beginner tutorial walks through the core Monday.com basics and shows where Sidekick AI fits into task and project management.

steps.heading: Set up your first board
steps.body: Create a board to represent a project or workflow, adding columns for status, owner, and due date.

steps.heading: Add and organize tasks
steps.body: Enter tasks as rows (items) on the board and group them so related work is easy to scan at a glance.

steps.heading: Open Sidekick AI
steps.body: Access Sidekick from within Monday.com to get AI-assisted help with generating boards, summaries, or task breakdowns.

steps.heading: Use Sidekick to speed up planning
steps.body: Ask Sidekick to draft a project plan or break a goal into tasks, then adjust the results to fit your actual workflow.

steps.heading: Track progress with views and automations
steps.body: Switch between board views like timeline or Kanban, and set up simple automations to move tasks or notify owners as status changes.

faq.question: Is Sidekick AI included in every Monday.com plan?
faq.answer: AI features like Sidekick are generally more available on higher-tier plans, so availability can depend on your subscription.

faq.question: Can Sidekick create an entire project board for me?
faq.answer: Yes, Sidekick can generate a starting board structure and tasks based on a prompt, which you can then customize.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills to use Monday.com as a beginner?
faq.answer: No, Monday.com is designed as a visual, drag-and-drop tool that doesn't require coding knowledge to get started.

faq.question: How is Monday.com different from a basic to-do list app?
faq.answer: Monday.com supports multiple views, automations, and team collaboration on top of task tracking, going well beyond a simple to-do list.
